title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 22.  HURRICANE RELIEF PROGRAMS INTEGRITY ACT

§2151.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Hurricane Relief Programs Integrity Act".

Acts 2006, No. 479, §1, eff. June 22, 2006.
